name: Generalized Anxiety Disorder
meta_description: Learn about generalized anxiety disorder: symptoms, causes, and effective treatment options.
description: Generalized anxiety disorder (GAD) is a mental health condition characterized by excessive, uncontrollable worry about everyday things.
causes: The exact cause is unknown, but likely involves a combination of genetic factors, brain chemistry, environmental stressors, and life experiences.

name: Social Anxiety Disorder
meta_description: Learn about social anxiety disorder: symptoms, causes, and strategies for managing social fears.
description: Social anxiety disorder is a mental health condition characterized by intense fear of social situations where one might be judged or embarrassed.
causes: May involve genetic factors, brain chemistry, learned behavior, and negative social experiences.
